particulars.description: All freehold and leasehold property together with all buildings and fixtures thereon vested in. The company.

All that freehold interest in the land and property known as 5 belgrave close, orpington BR5 3TJ. And registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number SGL519207. All that freehold interest in the land and property known as 108 eldred drive, orpington BR5 4PH. And registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number SGL261223. All that leasehold interest in the land and property known as 16 meadowview road, london, SE6. 3NN and comprised in the lease dated 6 march 2001 and made between business flats limited (1). and derek albert ingram (2) and as the same is registered at hm land registry with title absolute. Under title number TGL186479. All that leasehold interest in the land and property known as 56 hexal road, london SE6 1PN. And comprised in the lease dated 5 november 1990 and made between the mayor and burgesses. Of the london borough of lewisham (1) and david michael seal and jacqueline seal (2) and as the. Same is registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number TGL54080.
